text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English, the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 大家好，欢迎收听《Real Easy English》，这是一档用简单英语进行真实对话、帮助大家学习英语的播客节目。

text: I'm Neil. And I'm Beth. You can find a video version of this podcast
zh: 我是尼尔。我是贝丝。你可以在我们的网站上找到本播客的视频版本，

text: and a worksheet to help you learn on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 还有帮助你学习的练习表，网址是bbclearningenglish.com。

text: How are you today, Beth? I'm okay, Neil. I'm a little bit tired.
zh: 贝丝，你今天怎么样？我还好，尼尔，就是有点累。

text: How are you? I'm very well. I'm fine. Great.
zh: 你呢？我很好，我很好。太好了。

text: Good, good. Well, today we're going to talk about mistakes.
zh: 好的，好的。那么今天我们要聊聊“错误”这个话题。

text: So hopefully I won't make many mistakes being tired.
zh: 希望我虽然累，但也不会犯太多错误。

text: No. Mistakes can be things that are wrong, like a mistake in a maths problem.
zh: 不会的。“Mistake”可以指做错的事情，比如数学题里的一个错误。

text: But we can also use mistake to talk about really big things in life,
zh: 但我们也可以用mistake来谈论人生中一些真正重大的事情，

text: five decisions that you've made actions that you've taken yes that's true
zh: 比如你做过的决定、采取过的行动——对，没错。

text: so I think let's start the conversation let's do it
zh: 那我们就开始聊聊吧——来吧。

text: so Beth have you made any mistakes recently
zh: 贝丝，你最近犯过什么错误吗？

text: yes so I recently left my suitcase on a train by mistake
zh: 有的，我最近不小心把行李箱落在火车上了。

text: oh no so I was traveling from home to Leeds on the train train.
zh: 哦不。当时我正坐火车从家里去利兹。

text: And I got to the station at Leeds and there were loads of people and
zh: 到利兹站的时候，站台上全是人，

text: they were football fans and they were singing really loudly and I just wanted to get off the train and that's what I did.
zh: 他们是足球球迷，唱歌唱得特别大声，我当时只想赶紧下车，于是就下车了。

text: And then I realised about half an hour later that I didn't have my suitcase.
zh: 结果大概半小时后我才意识到，我的行李箱不见了。

text: Oh no. That's a bad mistake.
zh: 哦不，这个错误犯得可不小。

text: Did you get it back? I did. I was so lucky. The train stopped at Leeds.
zh: 后来找回来了吗？找回来了，我特别幸运。火车当时停在利兹站。

text: So when I realised, I ran and said to the people on the platform, my suitcase is on the train.
zh: 我意识到之后立刻跑过去，跟站台上的人说，我的行李箱还在车上。

text: And they held the train for me and I ran up the platform.
zh: 他们帮我拦住了火车，我就沿着站台跑过去，

text: I grabbed my suitcase and then they blew the whistle and the train went.
zh: 抓起行李箱，然后他们吹了哨子，火车就开走了。

text: I was so lucky. But yeah, that was a big mistake. And I will not make that mistake again.
zh: 我真是太幸运了。不过没错，那是个大错误，我以后再也不会犯了。

text: Everybody says that. So earlier we said that
zh: 大家都这么说。我们之前提到过，

text: mistakes can be small things, like my suitcase, but there are big mistakes that we can make.
zh: 错误可以是小事，比如我的行李箱，但也有我们可能犯下的大错误。

text: So have you ever made a big mistake, do you think?
zh: 那你觉得你犯过什么大错误吗？

text: Yeah, well, once I had a job that I really, really enjoyed.
zh: 嗯，有一次我有一份特别特别喜欢的工作。

text: I was teaching at a school in Prague in the Czech Republic, teaching English.
zh: 我当时在捷克布拉格的一所学校教英语。

text: And I loved the job and I had loads of really good friends but i had this feeling
zh: 我很喜欢那份工作，也交到了很多好朋友，但我有种感觉，

text: that i needed to go move somewhere else do something else with my life and so i resigned um
zh: 觉得我需要搬去别的地方，去做点别的事情，于是我就辞职了。

text: but then about a week or so later i realized that i really didn't want to leave that school
zh: 但大概一周后，我意识到我其实并不想离开那所学校，

text: so i went back to the boss and i
zh: 于是我又回去找老板，

text: said i've changed my mind i want to stay and he said well it's too late because i've given your job to somebody else
zh: 说我改变主意了，我想留下来，但他说太晚了，因为他已经把这个职位给了别人。

text: oh no that's so sad so you left your job left prague
zh: 哦不，太可惜了，那你就离开了工作，离开了布拉格吗？

text: no actually a bit like your suitcase beth um it ended up it ended up being okay
zh: 没有，其实有点像你的行李箱一样，贝丝，最后结果还不错。

text: because the person who took my job um then decided that he didn't want the job either so in the end i did stay so
zh: 因为接手我职位的那个人，后来也决定不想要这份工作了，所以最终我还是留下了，

text: when we make mistakes neil sometimes we then
zh: 尼尔，我们犯错误之后，有时候

text: have a regret or we regret the thing that we did
zh: 会感到后悔，或者说对自己做的事情感到懊悔。

text: that means that we feel bad about it or we wish that we'd done something differently do you have any regrets
zh: 也就是说我们对某件事感觉不好，或者希望当初做得不一样。你有什么后悔的事吗？

text: yeah when i was a kid i guess i was probably 12 or 13 i had some piano lessons
zh: 有，我小时候，大概十二三岁的时候，上过一段时间钢琴课。

text: and um i quit as soon as i could my parents gave me that choice
zh: 然后我一有机会就不学了，我父母当时给了我这个选择。

text: and i regret that because i love music and i play guitar and i think it i would have enjoyed playing piano
zh: 我很后悔，因为我很喜欢音乐，也弹吉他，我觉得我本来也会喜欢弹钢琴的。

text: i always think to be honest you shouldn't have any regrets because whatever you've done you've learnt something from it.
zh: 说实话，我一直觉得人不应该有遗憾，因为不管你做过什么，你都会从中学到东西。

text: Even if something bad happened,
zh: 即使发生了不好的事情，

text: then you know for next time and it's a kind of self -improvement thing.
zh: 你也能吸取经验，为下次做准备，这也算是一种自我提升。

text: That is a very positive attitude to mistakes, Beth.
zh: 贝丝，你对待错误的态度真的很积极。

text: Yeah, I think it's important to learn from your mistakes
zh: 是的，我觉得从错误中学习很重要，

text: and that's a common expression in English, to learn from your mistakes.
zh: 这在英语里也是一个常见的表达，叫做“从错误中学习”。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we've learnt in this podcast, starting with mistake.
zh: 我们来回顾一下这期播客学到的词汇，先从mistake开始。

text: And a mistake is an action that is wrong or that you do when you don't mean to.
zh: mistake指的是一个错误的行为，或者你并非故意做出的行为。

text: And we can make a mistake. That means we do something wrong.
zh: 我们可以说make a mistake，意思是做错了某件事。

text: Or we can do something by mistake, which means we do something accidentally without meaning to.
zh: 也可以说do something by mistake，意思是无意中、并非故意地做了某事。

text: For example, I left my suitcase on the train by mistake.
zh: 比如说，我不小心把行李箱落在火车上了（left my suitcase on the train by mistake）。

text: We also heard regret, which means feel bad or sorry about something you've done or a mistake that you've made.
zh: 我们还听到了regret这个词，意思是对自己做过的某件事或犯过的错误感到懊悔或抱歉。

text: And we heard learn from your mistakes, which means remember the mistake and then not do it again the next time.
zh: 我们还听到了learn from your mistakes，意思是记住这个错误，下次不要再犯。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English. You can test yourself on what you've learned
zh: 这一期《Real Easy English》就到这里了。你可以通过我们网站上的练习表

text: with a worksheet on our website bbclearningenglish .com. See you then. Goodbye. Bye.
zh: 来测试一下自己学到的内容，网址是bbclearningenglish.com。到时候见，再见，拜拜。
